## Issue Type

- [ ] 🐛 Bug Report
- [ ] ✨ Feature Request
- [ ] 🔧 Technical Debt / Refactoring
- [ ] 📄 Documentation
- [ ] 🔒 Security
- [ ] ⚡ Performance
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility

## Priority

- [ ] P0 — Critical (production down / security breach)
- [ ] P1 — High (blocking functionality)
- [ ] P2 — Normal (standard work)
- [ ] P3 — Low (nice to have)
